{"society_power": 2.5, "state_power": 5.5, "society_change": -0.5, "state_change": 2.5, "key_event": "Portalian order and 1833 Constitution consolidate centralized state", "reasoning": "The Portalian consolidation, the 1833 Constitution, mining/agricultural revenue windfalls, and military professionalization sharply strengthened state capacity to moderate levels, while the conservative victory at Lircay, press repression, and elite-dominated property suffrage suppressed the brief liberal opening, leaving civil society weak and subordinated."}
